evidence.detail: All 7 acceptance criteria met. P0(5)+P1(8)+P2(5)=18 fixes. Build passes. Vue=0, as-any=8/120, MOCK=0, token=1 key.

residual_risks: 8 `as any` remain — need component interface changes (Badge, TaskListTable, PreviewTable, AuditFilter)

Dual API layer (services/ vs api/) remains as architectural debt — both layers actively used
